message:
🐛 Fix DynamicCard test failure: resolve import/mock issue (#11116)

The test mocked lib/constants with only STORAGE_KEY_TOKEN, but the
transitive import chain (DynamicCard → useCache → demoMode) requires
STORAGE_KEY_DEMO_MODE and DEMO_TOKEN_VALUE from the same module.

Use importOriginal to spread all actual constants, preventing the
'No export defined on mock' error.

Signed-off-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: clubanderson <clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
